LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.enableDamage.Label: Enable damage
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.enableDamage.Descript: Allows damage to happen during gameplay.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.enablePlayerDamage.De: Allows your pawns and things to take damage.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.enableRandomMentalSta: Allows random mental breaks to happen.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.enableStoryteller.Des: Allows storyteller events to run normally.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.enableTranslationWind: Shows the translation helper window while using English.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.godMode.Label: Godmode
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.godMode.Description: Enables god mode tools and actions.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.devPalette.Label: Dev palette
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.pauseOnError.Label: Pause on error
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.pauseOnError.Descript: Pauses the game when an error happens.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.noAnimals.Label: No animals
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.unlimitedPower.Label: Unlimited power
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.unlimitedPower.Descri: Keeps powered buildings running without power limits.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.pathThroughWalls.Desc: Allows pathing as if walls were not blocking movement.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.instantRecruit.Label: Instant recruit
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.alwaysSocialFight.Des: Forces social interactions to turn into social fights.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.alwaysDoLovin.Label: Always lovin'
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.detectRegionListersBu: Turns on extra bug checks for region data.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.lowFPS.Label: Low FPS mode
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.lowFPS.Description: Runs in a deliberately slower performance mode.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.allowUndraftedMechOrd: Lets you give orders to mechs without drafting them.
Lets you edit light source colors.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.showHiddenPawns.Label: Show hidden pawns
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.showHiddenPawns.Descr: Shows pawns that are normally hidden.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.showHiddenInfo.Label: Show hidden info
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.showHiddenInfo.Descri: Shows extra hidden information in the UI.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.anomalyDarkeningFX.De: Turns anomaly screen darkening effects on or off.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastResearch.Label: Fast research
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastLearning.Label: Fast learning
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastLearning.Descript: Makes pawns gain skill experience much faster.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastEcology.Label: Fast ecology
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastEcologyRegrowRate: Only speeds up regrowth, not other ecology changes.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastCrafting.Label: Fast crafting
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastCaravans.Label: Fast caravans
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastCaravans.Descript: Makes caravan travel and updates faster.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastMapUnpollution.De: Makes pollution on the map clear faster.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.activateAllBuildingDe: Forces all building demands to be active.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.showLocomotionUrgency: Shows movement urgency details in the UI.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.playRitualAmbience.De: Plays ritual ambient audio when rituals run.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.simulateUsingSteamDec: Simulates Steam Deck behavior for testing.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.logRaidInfo.Label: Log raid info
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.logRaidInfo.Descripti: Writes raid details to the log.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.logTranslationLookupE: Writes missing translation lookups to the log.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.logPsychicRitualTrans: Writes psychic ritual step changes to the log.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.alwaysRareCatches.Des: Makes catches always roll as rare.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.alwaysNegativeCatches: Makes catches always roll as negative.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.logMismatchedLayoutFa: Writes layout faction mismatch details to the log.
Repeats the gravship cutscene in a loop.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.skipGravshipTileSelec: Skips choosing a tile for gravship actions.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.ignoreGravshipRange.D: Ignores range limits for gravship actions.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastLavaFlow.Label: Fast lava flow
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.evenFasterLavaFlow.De: Speeds up lava flow even more.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.DevCheat.fastShuttleExit.Label: Fast shuttle exit
